name: 374Water, Inc.
summary: 374Water, Inc. develops a wastewater treatment systems to recover resources from the waste and to keep drinking water clean. It offers AirSCWO Waste Processors, which is a supercritical water oxidation (SCWO) reactor that converts waste to clean water and carbon dioxide. The processor converts wastes such as biosolids (fecal sludge, primary, secondary, and digested sludge), animal manure, food and beverage waste, pharmaceutical wastes, and hazardous and industrial wastes. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Durham, North Carolina.
